title: eleocharis pseudobulbosa
intro: Eleocharis pseudobulbosa, a type of flowering plant commonly known as the spikerush or false bulb sedge, belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis pseudobulbosa include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, the rhizomes and roots of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures.
